creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 14:40:42 2012
New Revision: 304528
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304528

Log:
  Add trytond_calendar_classification 2.4.1, tryton Application Platform
  (Calendar Classification Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171495
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/
  head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:38:50 2012	(r304527)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:40:42 2012	(r304528)
@@ -118,6 +118,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_analytic_purchase
     SUBDIR += trytond_analytic_sale
     SUBDIR += trytond_calendar
+    SUBDIR += trytond_calendar_classification
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_percentage
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_weight

Added: head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:40:42 2012	(r304528)
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_calendar_classification
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Calendar Classification Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_calendar>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_calendar
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 14:40:42 2012	(r304528)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_calendar_classification-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 3cce69f38a4b21a4e0d8100e3b08dc593499d3b3c9e2520b8c653a4b738ad10c
+SIZE (trytond_calendar_classification-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 18205

Added: head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 14:40:42 2012	(r304528)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+This port adds the Calendar Classification Module to the Tryton
+Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_calendar_classification/pkg-plist
==============================================================================

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
